prompt: A user just said: 'Rust 的所有权系统是什么？' The knowledge base is at /tmp/knowledge-test/ with a small domain TestSmall (10 wiki pages). Follow the query skill to answer. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final answer to answer.md.
assertions: The agent read TestSmall/wiki/index.md (or knowledge-test/index.md then TestSmall/wiki/index.md)
The agent did NOT run any qmd commands (qmd search, qmd query, qmd update, qmd status)
The answer contains [[citations]] referencing actual wiki page names
The answer explains what ownership is based on wiki content
The agent did NOT attempt to install qmd or mention qmd installation
